name: Spirited Chocolates
recipeIngredient: 2 packages semisweet chocolate morsels (12 oz pkgs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the butter and liqueur; blend well.
2. Stir in enough powdered sugar until the mixture is the consistency of craft dough, kneading as necessary.
3. Shape the mixture into 4 dozen balls and chill.
4. Place chocolate in the top of a double boiler; bring water to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low and cook until the chocolate melts. Let it stand over hot water while you mold chocolates.
6. Spoon about 1/2 teaspoon melted chocolate into each plastic mold intended for chocolate-covered cherries.
7. Spread the chocolate to cover the sides of the mold using the back of a small spoon. Freeze about 10 minutes or until firm.
8. Place one fondant ball in each mold and spoon additional chocolate to fill the molds. Chill until firm.
9. Invert the plastic molds and gently tap to release the candy. Store in the refrigerator.
10. Yields 4 dozen.
NOTE: The candy mixture may also be dropped into melted chocolate if chocolate-covered cherry molds are unavailable.
